⬡
KV Clusterv1.0
W=2 · R=2 · N=3● 3 nodes healthy
DISTRIBUTED SYSTEMS SIMULATOR

Distributed

KV Store Cluster

A production-grade simulator of a 3-node consensus cluster — quorum writes, WAL-based recovery, leader/follower replication, network partition injection, and end-to-end distributed tracing. All backed by a real Postgres database.

⚖Quorum Consensus (W+R>N)📋Write-Ahead Log⇌Leader/Follower Replication✂Partition Simulation◎Distributed Tracing↺WAL Replay
No setup required
Quorum Formula
W+R>N→2 + 2 > 3✓
W=2 writesR=2 readsN=3 nodes
3
Cluster Nodes
W=2
Write Quorum
WAL
Crash-Safe Writes
P→A
Partition Tolerance
